name: @staccoverflow/zk-proofs-wasm
description: wasm-bindgen wrapper around solana-zk-sdk proof generators (PubkeyValidity, ZeroCiphertext, CiphertextCommitmentEquality, BatchedRangeProof{U64,U128}, BatchedGroupedCiphertext3HandlesValidity) for Token-22 ConfidentialTransfer. Pinned to zk-sdk v4.0.0 transcript (matches agave 2.3.x).
